Video.summary: Cesar Milan is called in to help singer Patti LaBelle who is afraid of her own guard dog and a teacher who wants to unify her dog's dual personalities.
Video.title: The Diva's Miracle Worker

Video.summary: Cesar helps a disrespectful yellow Lab who causes chaos everywhere she goes and some dogs who are misbehaving at the office.
Video.title: Gracie & Me

Video.summary: A mail carrier learns to thwart dog attacks; two Pomeranians attack each other when left alone; a Swiss mountain dog is aggressive around food.
Video.title: Mail Carriers vs. Dogs

Video.summary: Basset hounds sibling rivalry; aggressive dog; possessive poodle-mix.
Video.title: Dingo Dilemma

Video.summary: A blue heeler/Australian shepherd mix is overprotective of his owners; a school bus severely injures an American Staffordshire terrier; finding a new companion for a French bulldog.
Video.title: Biker Dog

Video.summary: A firehouse Dalmatian; a dog becomes aggressive toward his owners after being attacked by two other dogs.
Video.title: 4-Alarm Fire Dog

Video.summary: A border collie/springer spaniel mix bolts toward small animals; a shepherd mix has a biting problem; a pushy poodle.
Video.title: Mad Maya

Video.summary: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.
Video.title: French Bulldog Revolution

Video.summary: Cesar Milan's Dog Psychology Center in Los Angeles is both the home and refuge to nearly 50 dogs who are a resource in his work.
Video.title: The Power of the Pack

Video.summary: An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.
Video.title: Terrible Twosome

Video.summary: A French bulldog fails the doggy day-care entrance exam; three Jack Russell terriers fight one another for their owner's attention; a beagle howls incessantly while on walks.
Video.title: The Howling

Video.summary: An Australian shepherd bites people and lunges at strangers since losing an eye; a hound from an animal-testing lab fears people; a Maltese shows aggressive behavior and relieves itself on the carpet.
Video.title: Sick of Strangers

Video.summary: An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.
Video.title: Monster Mastiff

Video.summary: A ridgeback mix has eccentricities; a Jack Russell terrier attacks motorcycles; a border collie's herding instincts get the best of him.
Video.title: Motor Mouth

Video.summary: An Australian shepherd is too dedicated to its owner; a beagle mix lashes out at anyone who walks past; an Italian mastiff fears cars.
Video.title: The Dominator

Video.summary: Cesar visits Tijuana, Mexico, to team up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals, an organization that rescues dogs and finds them U.S. homes; a cocker spaniel taunts her owner.
Video.title: Saving Cesar

Video.summary: A blue heeler puts herself in danger chasing her owner's pickup truck; an American Eskimo/border collie mix won't walk; a golden retriever is aggressive.
Video.title: Tire Terrors

Video.summary: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.
Video.title: Bad Candy

Video.summary: Cesar's toughest cases have included a bulldog that munched on skateboards, a dog that gnawed garden hoses and basketballs, and a pit bull with issues.
Video.title: Cesar's Toughest Cases
